name: Bright Smile Dental
title: Bright Smile Dental — Fremont Family Dentistry
description: Gentle family and cosmetic dentistry in Fremont. New patients welcome — book online in seconds.
headline: A dentist your whole family will actually look forward to
heroText: Gentle, modern care for kids and adults in Fremont. Same-week appointments, most insurance accepted, and an office that doesn't feel like one.

services.title: General dentistry
services.text: Cleanings, fillings, and check-ups that keep small problems small.

services.title: Cosmetic
services.text: Whitening, veneers, and Invisalign for a smile you're glad to share.

services.title: New patients
services.text: Most insurance accepted, easy onboarding, and same-week openings.

about: We've cared for Fremont families for over a decade, with a calm, modern office and a team that remembers your name.
No upselling, no jargon — just honest care and a schedule that respects your time.
